title: rosa viscaria var. boullui
intro: Rosa viscaria var. boullui is a plant species that is a variant of the Bear's Breech, a type of wild rose native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. boullui include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its purported medicinal effects.
